summary.en: QB House challenged the emotional orientation of Japanese barbershops by stripping away nonessential services and creating a functional 10-minute, low-price haircut system with air-wash and traffic-light waiting signals.
summary.zh: QB House 挑战日本男士理发店的情感化服务导向，剔除非必要服务，创造 10 分钟、低价格、功能型快剪系统，并配合 air-wash 和交通灯等候提示。

sources.label: Blue Ocean Strategy · QB House case study
